hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen's diffusion model additionally on per-first-shell atom distances from the adsorbate center will decrease compositional leakage by at least 20% and reduce the mean absolute error between target adsorption energy and DFT-evaluated adsorption energy of reconstructed 3D structures by at least 0.10 eV, compared to conditioning on only adsorbate identity, adsorption energy, and allowed element list.
